title: v0.15.2 failure is a scientific negative result, not an execution failure
implication: The failure should be committed and used to guide correction rather than discarded.
recommended_action: Treat v0.15.3 as diagnostics before any new MPC run.

title: Best MPC surrogate candidate is far worse than the fixed baseline
implication: The current surrogate cannot be considered a baseline competitor.
recommended_action: Do not tune around this result until simulator comparability is corrected.

title: Multiple MPC candidates have identical metric signatures
implication: The current candidate parameters are not sufficiently identifiable in the surrogate.
recommended_action: Make control horizon and objective weights operational before the next comparison.

title: control_horizon is not active inside the MPC scoring loop
implication: Candidates with different control horizons can collapse to identical behaviour.
recommended_action: Implement explicit future control move sequences in v0.15.4.

title: v0.15.2 used delay_steps=0 while the simulator policy is delay-aware
implication: The surrogate may not be using the same temporal semantics as the baseline simulator.
recommended_action: Audit selected model metadata and enforce an explicit delay policy.

title: sine-approx has very high target-change density
implication: Settled/transient separation may be unstable for sine-like profiles.
recommended_action: Use a separate interpretation policy for high-frequency target profiles.

title: Case status distribution shows systemic surrogate weakness
implication: The failure is not isolated to one metric only.
recommended_action: Inspect profile-level diagnostics before selecting a corrected objective.
